nodes.name: Canoe Restaurant
nodes.description: name: Canoe Restaurant | time_block: 7:30 PM - 9:00 PM | description: Upscale Canadian cuisine on the 54th floor of TD Tower. Expensive fine dining with panoramic city views. Elegant and formal atmosphere. | travel_method: Taxi | expected_cost: CAD 150-200 | highlights: Expensive fine dining, City skyline views, Upscale atmosphere

nodes.name: Alo Restaurant
nodes.description: name: Alo Restaurant | time_block: 7:00 PM - 9:30 PM | description: Three Michelin-starred French tasting menu. Extremely expensive and exclusive fine dining. Intimate 8-course experience with wine pairings. Very formal and upscale. | travel_method: Taxi | expected_cost: CAD 300-400 | highlights: Expensive Michelin dining, Upscale French cuisine, Formal atmosphere

nodes.name: Hotel Continental Breakfast
nodes.description: name: Hotel Continental Breakfast | time_block: 7:30 AM - 8:30 AM | description: Quick breakfast at the hotel restaurant. Simple continental options, nothing special but convenient. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: CAD 25 | highlights: Quick and convenient, Basic options

nodes.name: FRANK Restaurant at AGO
nodes.description: name: FRANK Restaurant at AGO | time_block: 2:00 PM - 3:00 PM | description: Modern Canadian cuisine inside the Art Gallery. Artistic setting with creative seasonal menu. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: CAD 35-50 | highlights: Museum dining, Artistic atmosphere

nodes.name: Pai Northern Thai
nodes.description: name: Pai Northern Thai | time_block: 7:00 PM - 8:30 PM | description: Popular Thai restaurant known for authentic northern Thai cuisine. Lively atmosphere with bold flavors. Asian food option. | travel_method: Public Transit | expected_cost: CAD 30-45 | highlights: Thai Asian cuisine, Vibrant atmosphere

nodes.name: Quick Grab Coffee
nodes.description: name: Quick Grab Coffee | time_block: 7:00 AM - 7:30 AM | description: Fast coffee and pastry from Tim Hortons. Rushed morning before intense work day. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: CAD 8 | highlights: Quick breakfast, Grab and go

nodes.name: Lee Restaurant
nodes.description: name: Lee Restaurant | time_block: 7:30 PM - 9:00 PM | description: Susur Lee's flagship Asian fusion restaurant. Creative dishes blending East and West. Trendy atmosphere with innovative cuisine. | travel_method: Taxi | expected_cost: CAD 80-120 | highlights: Asian fusion cuisine, Celebrity chef

nodes.name: Mildred's Temple Kitchen
nodes.description: name: Mildred's Temple Kitchen | time_block: 9:00 AM - 10:30 AM | description: Popular brunch spot in Liberty Village. Famous for pancakes and weekend atmosphere. Trendy and casual. | travel_method: Taxi | expected_cost: CAD 30-40 | highlights: Brunch favorite, Fluffy pancakes

nodes.name: Kaiseki Kaji
nodes.description: name: Kaiseki Kaji | time_block: 8:00 PM - 10:00 PM | description: Exquisite Japanese kaiseki dining experience. Very expensive omakase with seasonal courses. Intimate and formal setting. | travel_method: Taxi | expected_cost: CAD 250-350 | highlights: Expensive Japanese dining, Upscale omakase, Formal atmosphere

nodes.name: Sunset Grill
nodes.description: name: Sunset Grill | time_block: 9:00 AM - 10:00 AM | description: Family-friendly breakfast chain with classic options. Good for kids with simple menu and quick service. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: CAD 20-30 | highlights: Family breakfast, Kid-friendly menu

nodes.name: Island Cafe Picnic Lunch
nodes.description: name: Island Cafe Picnic Lunch | time_block: 1:30 PM - 2:30 PM | description: Casual picnic-style lunch on Centre Island. Sandwiches and snacks from the island cafe. Relaxed outdoor dining. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: CAD 25 | highlights: Casual outdoor lunch, Family friendly

nodes.name: The Keg Steakhouse
nodes.description: name: The Keg Steakhouse | time_block: 7:00 PM - 8:30 PM | description: Classic steakhouse with something for everyone. Family-friendly atmosphere with reliable menu. Good for groups. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: CAD 60-80 | highlights: Family dinner, Steakhouse

nodes.name: Fran's Restaurant
nodes.description: name: Fran's Restaurant | time_block: 8:30 AM - 9:30 AM | description: Classic Toronto diner serving breakfast all day. Casual and unpretentious with hearty portions. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: CAD 20 | highlights: Classic diner, Toronto institution

nodes.name: Eataly Toronto
nodes.description: name: Eataly Toronto | time_block: 12:30 PM - 1:30 PM | description: Italian marketplace and restaurant in Manulife Centre. Indoor dining with fresh pasta, pizza, and espresso. Great for rainy day lunch. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: CAD 35-50 | highlights: Indoor restaurant, Italian cuisine

nodes.name: Cluny Bistro
nodes.description: name: Cluny Bistro | time_block: 7:00 PM - 9:00 PM | description: French-inspired bistro in the Distillery District. Romantic and intimate atmosphere with classic dishes and excellent wine list. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: CAD 70-90 | highlights: Romantic dinner, French bistro

nodes.name: Elements on the Falls
nodes.description: name: Elements on the Falls | time_block: 1:00 PM - 2:00 PM | description: Dining with direct view of Niagara Falls. Tourist location but unbeatable views. Part of the day trip package. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: CAD 45 | highlights: Falls view dining, Tourist spot

nodes.name: Antler Kitchen
nodes.description: name: Antler Kitchen | time_block: 8:00 PM - 9:30 PM | description: Canadian game meat restaurant featuring locally sourced venison, bison, and seasonal ingredients. Unique dining experience with rustic atmosphere. | travel_method: Taxi | expected_cost: CAD 80-100 | highlights: Unique Canadian cuisine, Game meat

nodes.name: Lady Marmalade
nodes.description: name: Lady Marmalade | time_block: 9:00 AM - 10:30 AM | description: Popular brunch spot in Leslieville known for creative breakfast dishes and great coffee. Trendy neighborhood vibe. | travel_method: Taxi | expected_cost: CAD 25-35 | highlights: Trendy brunch, Creative dishes

nodes.name: Urban Eatery Food Court
nodes.description: name: Urban Eatery Food Court | time_block: 1:30 PM - 2:15 PM | description: Food court in Eaton Centre with diverse quick options. Fast and convenient but generic mall food. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: CAD 15 | highlights: Quick lunch, Food court

nodes.name: Bar Isabel
nodes.description: name: Bar Isabel | time_block: 7:30 PM - 9:30 PM | description: Spanish tapas bar with lively atmosphere. Great for sharing plates and celebrating. Intimate and buzzy. | travel_method: Taxi | expected_cost: CAD 70-90 | highlights: Tapas sharing, Celebratory atmosphere

nodes.name: Hotel Quick Checkout Breakfast
nodes.description: name: Hotel Quick Checkout Breakfast | time_block: 7:30 AM - 8:15 AM | description: Fast breakfast before checkout. Simple pastries and coffee from hotel lobby. Rushed but necessary. | travel_method: Walk | expected_cost: CAD 15 | highlights: Quick breakfast, Checkout morning

nodes.name: 360 Restaurant at CN Tower
nodes.description: name: 360 Restaurant at CN Tower | time_block: 12:30 PM - 1:45 PM | description: Revolving restaurant atop CN Tower with panoramic views. Special occasion dining with Canadian cuisine. Memorable farewell lunch. | travel_method: Elevator | expected_cost: CAD 75-100 | highlights: Memorable special dining, Panoramic views
